reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Code reading verified: InitializeFromProtoUnsafeFulu (state_trie.go:649-652) directly copies proposer_lookahead from protobuf without length validation, bypassing SetProposerLookahead's check (setters_proposer_lookahead.go:18-19). Attack surface confirmed: SSZ deserialization (configfork.go:171) and database loading (state.go:552) both call InitializeFromProtoUnsafeFulu. ProcessProposerLookahead (transition.go:34-35) computes lastEpochStart = len(lookAhead) - SlotsPerEpoch, which becomes negative if lookahead is too short, causing panic in slice operations. Spec cross-reference (SG-008 process_proposer_lookahead): INV-003 requires fixed length (MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1)*SLOTS_PER_EPOCH = 64 for mainnet. Severity downgraded from High to Medium: Prysm consensus client share is 31%, which exceeds the Medium threshold (>5%) but falls below the High threshold (>33%). Single-client bug affecting 31% of network caps at Medium severity per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE severity_classification.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: SG-008 process_proposer_lookahead INV-003: proposer_lookahead length must remain (MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1)*SLOTS_PER_EPOCH
